part1.htmlContent:
Part 1

You must answer this question. Write your answer in 140–190 words in an appropriate style.

1 [ĐIỀN_LỜI_DẪN_TÌNH_HUỐNG_VÀO_ĐÂY]

Write an essay using all the notes and give reasons for your point of view.

[ĐIỀN_CÂU_HỎI_CHÍNH_CỦA_ESSAY_VÀO_ĐÂY]

Notes

Write about:

  1. 1. [ĐIỀN_GỢI_Ý_1]
  2. 2. [ĐIỀN_GỢI_Ý_2]
  3. 3. ...(your own idea)

part2.htmlContent:
Part 2

Write an answer to one of the questions 2–4 in this part. Write your answer in 140–190 words in an appropriate style.

2 [ĐIỀN_NỘI_DUNG_ĐỀ_SỐ_2_VÀO_ĐÂY]

3 [ĐIỀN_NỘI_DUNG_ĐỀ_SỐ_3_VÀO_ĐÂY]

4 [ĐIỀN_NỘI_DUNG_ĐỀ_SỐ_4_VÀO_ĐÂY]
